title: Score
description: A single AI-generated score for one trend on one dimension.

value.description: Raw score for sorting. UI displays band, not this.

confidence.description: Model self-reported confidence; low values surfaced differently in UI.

rationale.description: Human-readable justification. Must reference the evidence.

evidence.description: Stable source ids / metrics the score is grounded in. Empty is invalid.

rubricVersion.description: Date-versioned rubric used to produce this score.

composedFrom.description: For composite scores (e.g. opportunity): the sub-dimensions combined.
